text: The probability ordering is real but the edge is thin (overall Brier near the base rate). 'RSI>70 overbought' calibrates best (Brier 0.2302), while 'Gravestone Doji' is the least reliable (Brier 0.2516) — its raw probabilities are the most over/under-confident. Walk-forward calibration improves out-of-sample. Suggestion: down-weight 'Gravestone Doji' or apply isotonic recalibration to it before combining signals.
